title: Handmade Wood Picture Frames - Annapolis, Maryland
announcement: Thanks for visiting Severn River Frameworks! Every frame is cut, joined, and finished by hand in our Annapolis workshop. Custom sizes welcome.
vacation_message: We are away from the workshop. Orders placed now will ship when we return.
sale_message: Thank you for your order! Your handmade frame will be crafted and shipped within 3 to 5 business days.
policy_welcome: Welcome to Severn River Frameworks! We build solid-wood frames for artists and collectors.
policy_shipping: Frames ship within 3-5 business days, carefully packed to protect corners and glass.
policy_refunds: 30-day return policy on unused frames in original condition.
